title: OUTPATIENT SERVICES - 211info
text: KLAMATH BASIN BEHAVIORAL HEALTH ELDORADO OUTPATIENT SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Child, Adolescent, and Family Outpatient Services work with children presenting with problems of behavior, anxiety, depression, psychotic thinking, and trauma-related issues. Services include individual, family, and group therapy that focuses on strategic and structural family issues and support, trauma-related care, and wraparound services (for high-need children). 2210 Eldorado Avenue Klamath Falls, OR 97601 Eligibility: Age 18 and younger Hours: Monday-Friday 7:30am-5pm Email (541) 883-1030 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (541) 883-1030 Main phone Main phone/Crisis Line Main phone (541) 883-1030 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Offering same day access for intake, screening, and comprehensive evaluations. Walk in or call for more information FEES: Accepts OHP and some private insurance; offers sliding scale fees, no one is turned away for inability to pay DOCUMENTS: Insurance information, if applicable. Proof of income if applying for sliding scale fees. LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, ASL, Mandarin, German, Portuguese, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Klamath County SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 7:30am-5pm Services: Adolescent/Youth Counseling Family Counseling In Person Crisis Intervention Wraparound Facilitation/Community Support Other Services Offered At This Location: MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - ADULT MENTAL HEALTH SERVICES MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - MOBILE CRISIS SERVICES MENTAL HEALTH SUPPORT SERVICES - EARLY ASSESSMENT AND SUPPORT ALLIANCE If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. KLAMATH BASIN BEHAVIORAL HEALTH ELDORADO
